id: 20260708-100104-修复左侧-session-窄宽换行与-studio-子任务-session-命名
title: 修复左侧 Session 窄宽换行与 Studio 子任务 Session 命名

requestAffinity.note: Studio SDK child runs use the same Pi SDK/provider/auth/model-registry path as the parent chat, but provider request affinity is keyed by the independent child session id rather than reusing the parent session id.

subagents.prompt: 请为本任务做架构/修复设计。用户诉求：1）左侧 Session 列表在侧栏宽度很小时，上下内容显示错乱，Session 项内容不应自动换行，宽度不足时应单行截断/省略；2）YPI Studio 指派 subagent 产生的 child session 当前任务名称取错，不能直接用主任务名称，应优先使用 implementation subtask 的名称/标题，取不到再回退为“角色 + 主任务名称”。 请按项目规则：这是 UI 行为变化，必须安排 ui-designer …
subagents.summary:
已完成架构/修复设计，未修改生产代码。

## Artifacts produced

- `.ypi/tasks/20260708-100104-修复左侧-session-窄宽换行与-studio-子任务-session-命名/brief.md`
- `prd.md`
- `ui.md`
- `design.md`
- `implement.md`
- `checks.md`
- `handoff.md`

## Key design

- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx`
  - 修复 `SessionItem` / `ArchivedSessionItem` 窄侧栏换行错乱。
  - 统一应用 `minWidth: 0`、`overflow: hidden`、`whiteSpace: nowrap`、`textOverflow: ellipsis`、`flexWrap: nowrap`。
  - 重点处理 metadata row、Studio detail、hover actions、delete confirm。

- `lib/session-title.ts`
  - Studio child display title 改为：
    1. `studioChildDisplay.subtaskTitle`
    2. `member · taskTitle`
    3. run/task fallback

- `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts`
  - `studioChildSessionInfoName()` 改为 future SDK child session 的 `session_info` 名称优先使用 implementation subtask title。
  - 无 subtask title 时回退为 `member · 主任务名称`。

- `lib/session-reader.ts`
  - 现有 `projectStudioChildDisplay()` 已解析 `subtaskTitle`，预计无需新增 API 字段。

## Validation run

- 已执行源码/文档读取与定位。
- 已校验 `implement.md` 内 `ypi-implementation-plan` JSON 可解析。
- 未运行 `npm run lint` / `tsc`，因为本轮仅产出规划，未改生产代码。

## Remaining blockers / decisions

1. UI 门禁未完成：必须由 `ui-designer` 输出 HTML 原型并取得用户/主会话审批后才能实现。
2. 需确认 fallback 是否接受英文 member id，如 `implementer · 主任务名称`，或要求中文角色映射。
3. 主会话需采用/保存 `implement.md` 中 implementation plan，并在 UI 审批后切到实现。

### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/session-title.ts` — Studio child display title priority changed to:
  1. `studioChildDisplay.subtaskTitle`
  2. `member · taskTitle`

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

- `lib/session-reader.ts` already projects `subtaskTitle`; no API/type changes were needed.
- Fallback uses raw `studioChild.member` (e.g. `implementer · 主任务名称`). If Chinese role labels are required, main session needs to decide mapping.

subagents.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts` — updated SDK child `session_info` naming:
  - Resolves task detail by key, with archived/all-task fallback by task id.
  - Prefers `implementationProjection.subtasksWithStatus[].title`, then `implementationPlan.subtasks[].title`.
  - Falls back to `YPI Studio <member> · <taskTitle> · <runShortId>`.
  - Final fallback remains `YPI Studio <member> · <taskId basename> · <runShortId>`.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- Did not create a new Studio child session manually; behavior verified by code path and type/lint checks.
- Only future SDK child sessions get the corrected persisted `session_info`; historical display is handled by the prior display-title change.
- Existing unrelated working tree diffs were present in sidebar/title/docs; I did not modify them.

itemsPreview.text:
# handoff

## 架构结论

已完成需求梳理、源码定位、UI 门禁说明、修复设计与 implementation plan。未修改生产代码。

## 产物

- `brief.md`
- `prd.md`
- `ui.md`
- `design.md`
- `implement.md`
- `checks.md`
- `handoff.md`

## 关键定位

- 窄宽错乱：`components/SessionSidebar.tsx` 的 `SessionItem` / `ArchivedSessionItem` 需要统一单行截断规则，尤其是 metadata row、Studio detail 和 flex 容器的 `minWidth:0`/`overflow:hidden`/`whiteSpace:nowrap`。
- child session 命名：
  - 展示标题：`lib/session-title.ts` 当前 Studio child 优先 `studioChildDisplay.taskTitle`，应改为 `subtaskTitle -> member + taskTitle -> fallback`。
  - 未来持久名称：`lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts` 的 `studioChildSessionInfoName()` 当前使用主任务 title，应改为 subtask 优先。
  - 现有投影：`lib/session-reader.ts` 的 `projectStudioChildDisplay()` 已能解析 `subtaskTitle`，预计无需新增 API 字段。

## 验证状态

- 已执行：文档与源码读取、`rg` 定位。
- 未执行：`npm run lint`、`node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit`（本轮为架构规划，未改生产代码）。

## 阻塞 / 待决策

1. UI 门禁未完成：需主会话指派 `ui-designer` 输出 HTML 原型并取得用户/主会话审批后，才可进入实现。
2. 需确认 fallback 展示是否接受英文 member id（如 `implementer · 主任务名称`），或要求中文角色名映射。
3. 主会话需保存/采用 `implement.md` 中的 implementation plan，并在审批通过后切入实现。

itemsPreview.inputPreview:
{
  "path": ".ypi/tasks/20260708-100104-修复左侧-session-窄宽换行与-studio-子任务-session-命名/handoff.md",
  "content": "# handoff

## Implementation Complete

### Files Changed

- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` — Session/Studio child/archived rows now apply narrow-width-safe flex constraints so title rows, metadata rows, Studio detail, hover actions, and delete confirmation stay single-line with ellipsis/clipping.
- `lib/session-title.ts` — Studio child display titles now prefer `studioChildDisplay.subtaskTitle`, then fall back to `member · taskTitle`, then member-prefixed run/task fallbacks.
- `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts` — new SDK child `session_info` names now prefer the assigned implementation subtask title and otherwise use member + task title before task-id fallback.
- `docs/modules/frontend.md` — documented SessionSidebar narrow-width single-line truncation behavior.
- `docs/modules/library.md` — documented Studio child title priority and SDK child `session_info` naming behavior.

### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

### Notes / Risks

sidebar-nowrap.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` — tightened narrow-width layout for normal, Studio child, delete-confirm, hover-action, WorkTree badge, and archived session rows using `minWidth: 0`, `overflow: hidden`, `nowrap`, ellipsis, and stable flex shrink rules.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed
- `git diff --check -- components/SessionSidebar.tsx` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- Manual browser resize/hover/delete-confirm validation was not run in this delegated session.
- Scope kept to assigned `sidebar-nowrap`; Studio child title naming/display logic was not changed.

studio-child-title-display.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/session-title.ts` — Studio child display title priority changed to:
  1. `studioChildDisplay.subtaskTitle`
  2. `member · taskTitle`
  3. `member · runSummary`
  4. `member · taskId basename`
  5. existing ordinary session fallbacks
- `docs/modules/library.md` — Updated `lib/session-title.ts` behavior description.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- `lib/session-reader.ts` already projects `subtaskTitle`; no API/type changes were needed.
- Fallback uses raw `studioChild.member` (e.g. `implementer · 主任务名称`). If Chinese role labels are required, main session needs to decide mapping.

sdk-child-session-info-name.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts` — updated SDK child `session_info` naming:
  - Resolves task detail by key, with archived/all-task fallback by task id.
  - Prefers `implementationProjection.subtasksWithStatus[].title`, then `implementationPlan.subtasks[].title`.
  - Falls back to `YPI Studio <member> · <taskTitle> · <runShortId>`.
  - Final fallback remains `YPI Studio <member> · <taskId basename> · <runShortId>`.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- Did not create a new Studio child session manually; behavior verified by code path and type/lint checks.
- Only future SDK child sessions get the corrected persisted `session_info`; historical display is handled by the prior display-title change.
- Existing unrelated working tree diffs were present in sidebar/title/docs; I did not modify them.

docs-validation.summary:

#### Files Changed

- `docs/modules/frontend.md` — documented SessionSidebar narrow-width single-line truncation behavior.
- `docs/modules/library.md` — documented Studio child title priority and SDK child `session_info` naming behavior.
- `.ypi/tasks/.../handoff.md` — updated final handoff with validation results.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- Reviewed existing code changes for the selected `docs-validation` boundary.
- Manual narrow-sidebar UI regression is still recommended for checker review.
- Could not directly mark `docs-validation` complete in `task.json`; Studio child guard blocks delegated sessions from mutating `.ypi/tasks/**/task.json`. Parent session should update subtask status.
